data.title: Fintel Connect and Cornerstone Advisors Release New Report Revealing the Marketing ROI Gap in Banking
data.description: A recent study has shed light on the expenditure, evaluation methods, and challenges faced by financial institutions in demonstrating the effectiveness of marketing strategies. This emphasizes the necessity for expertise in performance marketing within the financial services sector. The research, conducted in Vancouver, BC, released on April 29, 2026, focused on the unique marketing landscape of financial services. It revealed how financial institutions allocate resources and struggle to quantify the impact of their marketing efforts. The study underscores the importance of specialized knowledge in performance marketing to address these industry-specific challenges.

data.title: Dan the Tire Man Launches No Credit Needed Program for Tire Industry, Driving Pre-Approved Financing Customers to Local Shops for Same-Day Sales and Installation
data.description: A new initiative has been introduced in Cave Creek, Arizona, on April 29, 2026, to assist independent dealers in securing both tire sales and installations. Dan the Tire Man revealed the implementation of Dan the Tire Man's No Credit Needed Program. This model aims to link dealers with customers who have already been cleared for financing, enhancing business opportunities.

data.title: Noah Holdings Limited Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Singapore, Noah Holdings Limited (NYSE: NOAH, HKEX: 6686) announced their position as a top wealth management company providing full-scale advisory services for global investment and asset allocation. Noah is recognized for its innovative approach and comprehensive offerings in this sector.

data.title: JackRabbit Launches MG Cargo: The 55 lb Cargo Electric Bike That Carries 10x Its Weight
data.description: JackRabbit Mobility recently unveiled the JackRabbit MG Cargo, a new ultra-lightweight cargo bike designed to address weight concerns in the industry. The company also introduced the ModRabbit Accessory Marketplace, Copilot Kit, and Side Rack Kit. This announcement was made in San Diego on April 29, 2026. The new cargo bike aims to revolutionize the market with its weight-saving features.

data.title: Century Aluminum Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Announcement
data.description: Century Aluminum Company, traded as CENX on NASDAQ, is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 7, 2026, once the market closes. The earnings report will be released via GlobeNewswire. Investors and analysts keenly await these figures to evaluate the company's performance during the first part of the year.

data.title: Echo360 Achieves WCAG 2.2 AA Compliance Across the Echosystem™
data.description: Surpassing the standard set by the industry further demonstrates Echo360's dedication to providing accessible learning opportunities worldwide. Today, in New York on April 29, 2026, Echo360, the top player in innovative learning solutions and AI-driven educational technology, announced their achievement of significant numbers in...

data.title: Earflo Announces FDA Clearance and US Market Availability of Award-Winning Pediatric Ear Pressure Treatment
data.description: A device that has won awards from TIME and CES is gaining attention for its innovative approach to addressing middle ear pressure and fluid buildup in children without the need for surgery. This condition impacts millions of families worldwide. Developed by Earflo, a medical technology company based in SAN CARLOS, Calif., the device provides a non-surgical solution for this common issue. The innovation was recognized by prestigious organizations and has the potential to significantly benefit those affected by the condition. The news was released on April 29, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.title: Upstart Announces $1.25B Forward-Flow Agreement with Fortress Investment Group
data.description: Upstart Holdings, Inc., a prominent AI lending platform, recently revealed a forward-flow commitment from affiliates of Fortress Investment Group. Under this agreement, Fortress will buy up to $1.25 billion in consumer loans originated through Upstart over 15 months. This comes after an earlier forward flow deal between the two companies that was disclosed in 2025.

data.title: OSIbeyond Launches Compliance as a Service (CaaS), Eliminating Upfront Costs for CMMC Compliance
data.description: OSIbeyond, a top managed IT and cybersecurity firm focused on the Defense Industrial Base (DIB), unveiled its Compliance as a Service (CaaS) solution in Rockville, Maryland. The service is subscription-based and fully managed, aiming to assist defense contractors in meeting Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) standards. By adopting this model, companies can achieve and uphold CMMC compliance without the typical complexities and initial expenses associated with traditional project-based methods. This innovative solution offers a new approach to compliance within the DIB sector.

data.title: Deepgram Launches Flux Multilingual: The World’s First Multilingual Conversational Speech Recognition Model
data.description: Deepgram, a real-time AI infrastructure company headquartered in San Francisco, has released Flux Multilingual, a conversational speech recognition model that extends beyond English to encompass 10 languages. This new feature allows for automatic detection, comprehension, and switching of languages in real time within a single conversation. It provides developers, enterprises, and product teams working on voice agents with the capability to utilize this multilingual functionality.

data.title: quip and Glowbar Partner to Elevate Everyday Self-Care Through Routine-Driven Oral and Skin Wellness
data.description: Recent collaboration demonstrates how small, consistent rituals can yield significant outcomes. In a move reflecting the trend towards straightforward, routine-based well-being efforts, top companies quip and Glowbar have partnered on a diverse range of initiatives. This collaboration aims to underscore the impact of habitual behaviors in achieving positive results.

data.title: Everbridge Names Caitlyn Gillespie Chief Meteorologist to Strengthen Weather Risk Intelligence for Critical Event Management
data.description: Everbridge, Inc., a leading provider of High Velocity Critical Event Management (CEM) and national public warning solutions, has appointed Caitlyn Gillespie as Chief Meteorologist at their headquarters in Vienna, Virginia. Gillespie, a seasoned professional in severe weather forecasting and emergency management, joins the company's Risk Intelligence team to enhance operational decision support services. In her new position, Gillespie will leverage her expertise to provide top-tier weather insights to Everbridge’s clients, elevating their understanding of critical events.

data.title: Tempus to Host Inaugural Investor Day on May 29, 2026
data.description: A technology company, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), operating in the field of AI for precision medicine, disclosed plans to hold an Investor Day on Friday, May 29, 2026. This event, commencing at 8:00 a.m. CT / 9:00 a.m. ET, will showcase the company's key executives: Founder and CEO Eric Lefkofsky, Chief Financial Officer Jim Rogers, CEO of Data and Applications Ryan Fukushima, CEO of Diagnostics Tom Schoenherr, as well as Chief Scientific Officer [Name not provided].

data.title: Ireland's National Screen Acting School Launches Its First International Campus in Los Angeles
data.description: Renowned coach Gerry Grennell, known for mentoring stars like Heath Ledger, Oscar Isaac, and Natalie Portman, is bringing his acclaimed method to Los Angeles. On April 29, 2026, Bow Street Academy, Ireland's top screen acting school, revealed the launch of Bow Street Academy Los Angeles, its inaugural location in the city. This expansion marks a significant move for the academy as it aims to reach a wider audience of aspiring actors in the entertainment capital, offering Grennell's expertise to support new talent.

data.title: Travelers aged 30 and under save $20 on new TSA PreCheck® membership
data.description: During the month of May, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) announced a special promotion called "$20 Take Off" starting on April 29, 2026. This promotion coincides with the summer travel season and graduation periods for high school and college students. Travelers can take advantage of this limited time offer and enjoy benefits for a discounted rate of $20.

data.title: KNOREX Targets $80 Billion Market with New AI-Powered XPO Optimizer
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, KNOREX Ltd. (NYSE American: KNRX) unveiled significant upgrades to its KNOREX XPO℠ platform. The enhancements include an AI-driven Keyword Optimizer for Google Ads and a advanced Machine Learning-powered Data-Driven Attribution (DDA) model for Meta, Google, TikTok, and other primary native platforms. These improvements aim to aid advertisers in optimizing their campaigns.

data.title: SUI Group Schedules First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for May 7, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET
data.description: SUI Group Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: SUIG) based in Wayzata, Minnesota, will be conducting a conference call on Thursday, May 7th, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET to review its financial and operational performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31st, 2026. The company will disclose its financial outcomes through a press release before the scheduled call. The executive team from SUI Group will lead the conference call and engage in a Q&A session with participants.
